creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Update to OpenJUMP 1.6.1. 

I tried to use ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS} for the docs. This implicates, that I have to also use .include <bsd.port.pre.mk> now. Perhaps someone finds a more elegant solution?

Coming from 1.5.1, this brings many new features, improvements and bugfixes. Some more interesting are

- adding support for GeoTIFF
- add a PostGIS writer
- new csv driver with an automatic mode

A suitable PostGIS driver has to be manually installed from the OpenJUMP plugins pages, because there are many different PostGIS versions around.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
